name: Cinder Creatures
description: Cinder monster-catcher pack for GB Studio 4.x: 56 creature sprites (cinderized — DMG-quantized + outlined + type-marked, visually distinct from any RBY references), 14 script events incl name-entry, 14 backgrounds incl 4 trainer portraits + battle arena + game-over, overworld tileset, 5 sound FX, starter trio (KERNITE/RECURSE/BYTEFLY), 5-type chart, 5 named gym leaders (ARCHIVIST EOS / WARDEN SOMA / CONDUCTOR TEMPO / COURIER HERMES / FOREMAN ATLAS), USB-tied catching loop spec. Drop in plugins/ and reload.
author: Meridian (for Joel Kometz)
